summary: Mining bug fix verified - Race condition in frontend state management fixed. After clicking 'Start Mining', UI correctly shows 'Mining Active' (green banner) and does NOT revert to 'Mining Paused'. State persists after page refresh.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly uses optimistic state update from /api/mining/start response (session_active: true)
setMiningStatus is called with session_active: true BEFORE the delayed fetchMiningStatus call
The 2-second delay before fetchMiningStatus allows backend to fully persist the session
Mining.js lines 114-156 properly handle the API response data
seed_data_creation: Reset mining state for admin user to test start flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mining bug fix verified. The race condition was in Mining.js where fetchMiningStatus() was called immediately after start API without using response data. Fix uses optimistic update from API response. Test flow: Login -> Navigate to /mining -> Click 'Start Mining' -> Verify green banner stays active.

Mining_Start_Flow.initial_state: PASSED - Orange/red banner showing 'Mining Paused' with 'Start Mining' button
Mining_Start_Flow.immediate_state_1s: PASSED - Green banner showing 'Mining Active' with toast 'Mining Started! Earning PRC Now!'
Mining_Start_Flow.state_after_4s: PASSED - Green banner still active, 'Mining in Progress' section visible

Mining_State_Persistence.page_refresh: PASSED - After refresh, mining state persisted
Mining_State_Persistence.remaining_time: PASSED - Shows '23h 59m remaining in this session'
Mining_State_Persistence.session_end_time: PASSED - Shows correct session end time

Backend_API_Verification.mining_status_endpoint: PASSED - Returns session_active: true, remaining_hours: 23.98, is_mining: true
Backend_API_Verification.mining_start_endpoint: PASSED - Returns session_active: true with session times

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Mining starts but immediately shows as 'paused'. After clicking 'Start Mining', the UI briefly shows active state then reverts to 'Mining Paused'.
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Race condition in frontend state management - fetchMiningStatus() was called immediately after the start API call without using the response data.
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated startMiningSession function to use API response data optimistically. setMiningStatus is now called with session_active: true BEFORE the delayed fetchMiningStatus call.
